_comment: ROOM SCHEMA — one file per room in assets/rooms/
name: Forest Clearing
description: A sun-dappled clearing surrounded by tall oaks. Wind rustles the canopy above.
ambient: Leaves rustle softly in the breeze.

objects.name: old rug
objects.description: A moth-eaten rug covering part of the floor.

on_interact.move: You drag the rug aside, revealing a trapdoor beneath.
on_interact.look: A dusty, frayed rug. It looks like it's hiding something.
on_interact.search: The rug's edges are stiff with age.

objects.name: trapdoor
objects.description: A sturdy wooden trapdoor set flush into the earth.

on_interact.open: The trapdoor creaks open, revealing a dark shaft leading down.
on_interact.look: Iron hinges, oak planks. Solid construction.
on_interact.smash: The trapdoor splinters under your blow. The shaft is open.

objects.name: old chest
objects.description: A battered wooden chest. The lock looks rusted through.

on_interact.unlock: You insert the key — the lock gives way with a clunk.
on_interact.smash: You smash the chest open. Splinters everywhere.
on_interact.look: An old chest, bound with iron straps.
